commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a state-repository-backed weighted provider lease with TTL pruning to gate exact-event Codex reviews and report capacity waiting separately from lease-state failures.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: keep active lease weight at configured capacity through the wait deadline; acquisition returns false, and all review and publication steps are skipped while the earlier waiting status remains.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The stale timeout status is a narrow workflow defect with a clear code and test repair; live behavior proof remains a separate contributor or maintainer action.

target.title: fix(review): gate exact reviews by provider lease
target.body:
## Why
ClawSweeper exact reviews can run from many GitHub workflow instances at once. Worker sizing only controls local/shard concurrency; it does not protect the shared Codex provider/API-key capacity across independent runs. The important behavior change in this PR is to move overload handling from "start Codex, hit provider capacity, then retry/fail" to "reserve a global provider slot before starting Codex."

That gives us a controlled queue/backpressure point inside ClawSweeper: when global provider capacity is full, an exact review waits for a lease and reports `Waiting for Codex capacity` instead of stampeding the provider and amplifying transient transport/capacity failures. If the provider-lease state update itself fails, the run now fails explicitly rather than pretending capacity is merely full.

## Summary
- add a state-repo-backed Codex provider lease tool with weighted capacity, TTL pruning, and acquire/release commands
- gate exact event reviews on a global provider lease before invoking Codex, then release before publishing state
- make current workflow capacity configuration authoritative over persisted lease state so emergency capacity changes take effect
- distinguish provider capacity waits from provider-lease state update failures in command status

## Testing
- `pnpm run build:repair`
- `pnpm run format:check`
- `node --test test/repair/provider-lease.test.ts`
- `node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts --test-name-pattern "exact event reviews|provider capacity only"`
- `autoreview --mode local` clean after fixes
- `pnpm run check` on Node v24.15.0
target.author: hxy91819

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
